versions.version_description: A simplified version that is easy to play on guitar.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Just Called To Say I Love You

recommended.version_description: Hello, This was made to be as accurate as possible. These are the closest to the studio version, and if you want to have less barre chords , put a capo on 2nd fret and transpose down 2 steps.

content:
____________________
   / Stevie Wonder     /
  / Part-Time Lover   /
 / In Square Circle  /
/___________________/


 Intro:
||: [ch]Bbm7[/ch] | %  [ch]Ab[/ch] | [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch] | %  [ch]Fm7[/ch] |

| [ch]Ebm7[/ch] | [ch]Fm7[/ch] | [ch]Bbm7[/ch] | [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch] :||



 Verse:
||: [ch]Bbm7[/ch] | %  [ch]Ab[/ch] | [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch] | %  [ch]Fm7[/ch] |

                             1.
| [ch]Ebm7[/ch] | [ch]Fm7[/ch] | (Ab/Bb) [ch]Bbm7[/ch] | % :||

 2.
| %  [ch]Abm7[/ch] [ch]Db9[/ch] |



 Chorus:
| [ch]Gb[/ch] | % | [ch]Db[/ch] | % |

| [ch]Ebm7[/ch] | % | [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7-5[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] | [ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Abm7[/ch] [ch]Db9[/ch] |

| [ch]Gb[/ch] | % | [ch]Db[/ch] | % |

| [ch]Ebm6[/ch] | % | [ch]F7sus4[/ch] | % |



 Verse

 Chorus

 Intro (again, play the "Abm7 Db9" right before the chorus)

 Chorus

 Verse (play the last 4 bars 3 times;
        break on the very last bar with an extra "Ab/Bb Bbm7")

 Intro, repeat till fadeout



 LYRICS
**********
Call up, ring once, hang up the phone
To let me know you made it home
Don't want nothing to be wrong with part-time lover

If she's with me I'll blink the lights
To let you know tonight's the night
For me and you my part-time lover

We are undercover passion on the run
Chasing love up against the sun
We are strangers by day, lovers by night
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right

If I'm with friends and we should meet
Just pass me by, don't even speak
Know the word's "discreet" when part-time lovers

But if there's some emergency
Have a male friend to ask for me
So then she won't peek its really you my part-time lover

We are undercover passion on the run
Chasing love up against the sun
We are strangers by day, lovers by night
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right

We are undercover passion on the run
Chasing love up against the sun
We are strangers by day, lovers by night
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right

I've got something that I must tell
Last night someone rang our doorbell
And it was not you my part-time lover

And then a man called our exchange
But didn't want to leave his name
I guess that two can play the game
Of part-time lovers
You and me, part-time lovers
But, she and he, part-time lovers



------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 2nd/ March /10
 Just mail me at Maitinin@gmail.com with questions, comments and corrections!
